text: Inside the glass-walled room, I sense a strange mix of anticipation and detachment. The sterile architecture and distant chatter evoke a feeling of isolation, yet I'm drawn to the energy of quiet collaboration. I oscillate between curiosity towards the people inside and a self-conscious awareness of my role as merely an observer, separated by transparent barriers as if observation itself holds me apart from experience. There is an odd comfort and discomfort in this in-between state, belonging and not-belonging at once.
